PROFILE
Electronics engineer with 2 years of experience in embedded firmware and IoT telemetry, comfortable owning features from schematic review to cloud dashboards and writing production C for resource-constrained targets.

• Bosch Global Software Technologies
Embedded Software Engineer Aug 2023 - Present
– Shipped CAN-over-Ethernet diagnostics firmware for two ECU platforms with zero field escapes
◦ Cut OTA update failures from 6% to 0.8% by adding resumable chunked transfers
– Profiled and removed a heap fragmentation bug that froze gateways after 21 days of uptime

Firmware Intern Jan 2023 - Jun 2023
– Ported a FreeRTOS BSP to an STM32H7 board and wrote drivers for SPI flash and BLE
◦ Automated HIL regression with pytest, trimming release validation from 3 days to 6 hours
